title: lithospermum moltkioides
intro: Lithospermum moltkioides, also known as Moluki Lithosperm, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithospermum moltkioides include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Lithospermum moltkioides is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
